# Generated-source notice

The Meridian Annex environment art target was generated with OpenAI GPT Image through Codex on 2026-07-20 from original clean-room project prompts and four project-owned construction renders. Its source-output rights basis is the OpenAI Terms of Use accessed on 2026-07-20. Generated output may not be unique, so the target remains subject to human originality, similarity, construction, feasibility, and rights review before any Gate-1 pass or production-model authorization. The editable Blender construction source remains separately project-original.
